title: extract_* use push loops instead of filter+collect
description: evaluator.rs — extract_match_type (279-307), extract_comparator (311-332), extract_address_part (335-358) all use the same manual pattern: declare a mutable Vec, for-loop over forms, push non-matching elements. This is filter().collect() in disguise, written three times. Idiomatic Rust expresses this with a mutable accumulator and a single filter pass, or using partition. The push loops obscure the invariant and are three copies of the same structural pattern.
